description: Index of all reusable skills in GenJess-OS. Skills follow the standard Agent Skills specification (SKILL.md with YAML frontmatter).

skills.name: deploy-pipeline
skills.description: End-to-end deploy pipeline for any web deliverable. Commits HTML + assets to GitHub, verifies Vercel deployment with byte-count verification, optionally uploads media, and composes success email.

skills.name: firecrawl
skills.description: Elite web research and structured data extraction using Firecrawl. Wide-net discovery, deep crawling, markdown extraction, and evidence gathering.

charters.name: outbound-studio-charter
charters.description: Outbound Studio Agent Agency Charter — business model, agent topology, and operating principles.

charters.name: axonai-agency-charter
charters.description: AxonAI Agency Master Charter — market, product, revenue model, and systems.
